title: CHW Checklist
description: Missing-information checklist generated from an extracted encounter. Each question must correspond to an unknown/null field in the encounter.

field.description: The encounter field this question aims to fill (e.g. 'symptoms.fever', 'onset_days', 'patient.age_group')

question.description: Plain-language question for the CHW to ask the patient

priority.description: Clinical priority of obtaining this information
